---
pagetitle: "Lukas A. Grahl"
description: "PhD student in Finance and Economics at Aarhus University."
---

:::: {.home-hero}
::: {.home-photo-wrap}
<img class="home-photo" src="images/portrait.jpg" alt="Portrait of Lukas A. Grahl">
:::

::: {.home-copy}
<p class="eyebrow">PhD student in Finance and Economics · Aarhus University</p>

# Lukas A. Grahl

<p class="home-lead">I am a PhD student at the Department of Economics and Business Economics at Aarhus University. My research lies at the intersection of household finance and behavioural finance, with a focus on decision-making under ambiguity and uncertainty.</p>

<!-- I am particularly interested in how investors form beliefs, process information, and adjust their portfolios over time. Outside research, I enjoy running, cooking, rowing, and analogue photography. -->

::: {.home-links aria-label="Profile links"}
[Research](research.qmd)
[CV](cv.qmd)
[Email](mailto:lukas.grahl@amkat.de)
[GitHub](https://github.com/lukasgrahl)
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/lukasgrahl)
:::
:::
::::
